page.title: Audaz Tactical Timer
page.subtitle: Select a mode — field timing and performance measurement

standard-shot.title: Standard Shot
standard-shot.description: Split and total time measurement for classic shooting cycles.

dry-fire.title: Dry-Fire Analysis
dry-fire.description: Dry-fire training with safety checks, rack filter, and shot→rack cycle scoring.

fof.title: FOF (Force-on-Force)
fof.description: Scenario engagement times and decision intervals.

structural-frame.title: Structural Frame Test
structural-frame.description: Phased structural movement and frame-transition timing.

placeholder.title: Coming soon
placeholder.subtitle: This timing mode is being prepared — analysis panels land in a later release.

hardware.connectHint: Connect your AUDAZ device via Bluetooth (BLE) or USB Serial

toast.linkLost: Hardware link lost — audio/trigger listening stopped

error.usbUnsupported: Web Serial is unavailable in this browser (Chrome/Edge recommended)
error.bleUnsupported: Web Bluetooth is unavailable in this browser (Chrome/Edge recommended)
error.usbFailed: Could not open USB port. Check permissions or the cable.
error.bleFailed: Bluetooth connection failed. Make sure the device is on and nearby.
error.linkLost: Bluetooth/USB disconnected unexpectedly. Audio and trigger stream stopped — reconnect in Settings.

calibration.title: Settings & Calibration
calibration.subtitle: Acoustic threshold, NeoPixel, MPU-6050, screen simulation, and hardware

mpu.title: Accelerometer + gyroscope (MPU-6050)
mpu.hint: Sensor full-scale range — pick based on field vibration.
mpu.targetHint: When connected, the dot tracks live ax/ay; the reticle rotates with yaw (gyro Z). Zero stores ax/ay and yaw offsets.

guide.title: G-Force range guide
guide.subtitle: The selected range lights up in the list — tap a card to change it.

precision.body: High sensitivity for dry-fire and muzzle flinch analysis.

balanced.body: Optimum balance for standard field drills and dynamic shooting.

impact.body: Capture high recoil shock from live-fire ammunition.

serial.title: Hardware link
serial.failed: Could not open port. Check permissions or cable.

screen.title: Simulation & screen calibration
screen.subtitle: Screen orientation and physical diagonal drive target scale and circle roundness.
screen.hint: Enter your device’s real screen inches — the scale engine derives px/inch and aspect from it.
screen.eyeHint: Your physical viewing distance. Combined with engagement range and screen inches it builds the retinal-angle (MOA) Final Scale Matrix.

toast.savedAndSent: Settings saved and sent to device

standardShot.armHint: Pick a delay mode, then arm. First bang after FIRE FREE is your reaction time.

delayMode.label: Start delay
delayMode.randomHint: On start, a random wait between 2–4 seconds is applied.

standardShot.manualHint: No hardware? Use Space or manual bang to test

unsavedGuard.title: Warning — unsaved session
unsavedGuard.body: You have an unsaved shot session. Starting a new test or resetting will discard the current data. Continue?

serial.unsupported: Web Serial unavailable — use manual trigger

save.error: Save failed — check that you are signed in

dryFire.manualHint: While armed: Space / Enter or manual trigger — hits accumulate

safety.title: Safety confirmation
safety.subtitle: Confirm all three items before starting dry-fire training.
safety.hint: Start stays disabled until every box is checked.
safety.lockHint: This screen cannot be dismissed — the timer will not start without safety confirmation.

items.magazine: Magazine removed — no live ammunition in the firearm
items.muzzle: Muzzle pointed in a safe direction — clear backstop

prep.title: Rack the slide
prep.body: Cycle the slide to set the firearm. Rack sounds in this phase are not scored as shots.
prep.rackHeard: Rack sound detected (ignored). Confirm when ready.
prep.armLocked: In fullscreen, tap Beep & Start, rack the slide, then press READY.

steps.one: Keep the muzzle in a safe direction
steps.two: Fully cycle the slide to chamber / set
steps.three: Press READY when done — the session starts

cycle.shotBody: The next trigger press is scored. After a shot, the rack sound is filtered automatically.
cycle.rackBody: Cycle the slide. This sound is not scored; then back to shot (Trigger → Rack).

target.hint: Calibration point stays hidden — only hits are shown

fullscreen.escHint: Press ESC or the Exit button (top-right) to leave fullscreen
fullscreen.unsupported: Fullscreen is not supported or was blocked by the browser

protocol.title: Fullscreen protocol
protocol.body: Tactical Timer operations run in fullscreen only. Settings, arming, and session controls stay locked until then.
protocol.reentryBody: Fullscreen was left during a session. Operations were stopped — re-enter fullscreen to continue.
protocol.hint: Mandatory safety protocol · leaving fullscreen aborts the session

rings.hint: Ring diameters are physical paper sizes (X=5 cm, 10=10 cm, 9=20 cm…). Distance scale shrinks the face; cm values stay fixed.
rings.hintLive: On-screen equivalent diameters at {{dist}} m (live from scale matrix). Subline is paper reference.
rings.screenFace: On this screen, paper face ≈ {{cm}} cm

analytics.modalHint: Records keep collecting in the background until you Save Session
analytics.empty: Record at least one hit for analysis

history.emptyHint: Use Save Session after shots to archive

fullscreen.unsupported: Fullscreen is not supported or was blocked by the browser

protocol.title: Enter Fullscreen
protocol.body: Fullscreen is required to use this mode.
protocol.reentryBody: Fullscreen was left during a session. Operations were stopped — re-enter fullscreen to continue.
protocol.hint: Click the button below to continue.
